rulings.Case Title: GRADY FRAZIER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 30, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant CBS Corp.¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute pursuant to C.C.P. 583.410-583.430 is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless defendant notifies plaintiff of this tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. The hearing will be at 11:15a.m., not 9:30a.m. Defendant must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/TLJ)
